evidence.scientific_clarity: All brief requirements met: 3 methods, 50 steps, mean±95% CI error bands, log-scale y-axis, and gap annotation at final step.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype='none' set anywhere in script; font defaults to DejaVu Sans (not publication-quality); font sizes (8–12pt) are otherwise reasonable.
evidence.palette: Uses Paul Tol bright palette (#888888 gray, #4477AA blue, #EE6677 red) which is colorblind-safe; varied linestyles (solid/dashed/dash-dot) provide redundant encoding.
evidence.layout_density: tight_layout and 6×4 figsize are sensible; however annotation text is placed at final_step+0.6 which exceeds xlim(steps[-1]), risking clipping; legend loc unspecified.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption precisely matches figure content with specific Δ=0.155 claim; legend has no explicit placement and could overlap curves; annotation outside xlim is a reproducibility risk.
evidence.vector_fidelity: figure.pdf is saved but pdf.fonttype=42 is never set, so text is rendered as Type 3 (bitmap) fonts — not selectable or editable in Illustrator/Inkscape.
evidence.file_format: All four required outputs present and non-trivial: figure.pdf, figure.png, caption.tex, gen_figure.py; bonus figure.svg also generated.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states the specific numerical finding (Δ=0.155 at step 49), reports n=5 seeds and 95% CI, notes log scale, and identifies the winning method — complete and precise.

overall_strengths: Colorblind-safe Paul Tol palette with redundant linestyle encoding makes the figure accessible and publication-ready in color and grayscale.
Caption is exemplary: includes a specific numerical claim (Δ=0.155), experimental details (n=5 seeds, 95% CI), and axis scale — directly matches the figure.
overall_weaknesses: Missing pdf.fonttype=42 (and svg.fonttype='none') means PDF/SVG text is bitmapped Type 3 — not selectable, not editable, and will fail many journal submission checks.
Annotation label placed at x = final_step + 0.6 outside the explicit xlim, and legend location is unspecified — both are fragile layout choices that could produce clipped or overlapping elements.
